name: Banana and Mango Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and packed brown sugar until fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time until incorporated.
4. In another bowl, combine self-raising flour with salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Combine mashed bananas with mango puree.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and banana mixture to the creamed mixture until just combined.
7. Fold in raisins and chopped walnuts.
8. Pour batter into two greased 8 1/2 by 4 1/2 inch loaf pans.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the centre comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and cooling on racks.
11. Makes 2 loaves.
